title: CT1.decide.payload completed discharge record — Payload classification
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for semantic CT1-v1 node CT1.decide.payload.

status.description: Required successful proof state for this executable machine node.

dischargedContracts.description: Exact contract families discharged at CT1.decide.payload: S-Dich, S-Pers, S-Rout.

contains.description: Requires S-Dich, which provides the exhaustive proof-carrying alternatives.
Requires S-Pers, which retains the exact target-avoiding predecessor state.
Requires S-Rout, which constructs the indexed downstream route.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract instances for CT1.decide.payload; every declared family is required.

schema.description: Discriminator for S-Dich evidence at CT1.decide.payload; it provides the exhaustive proof-carrying alternatives.
Discriminator for S-Pers evidence at CT1.decide.payload; it retains the exact target-avoiding predecessor state.
Discriminator for S-Rout evidence at CT1.decide.payload; it constructs the indexed downstream route.

statement.informal: Classify one target-avoiding state into exactly one of the six typed consumer payloads.

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: The Lean contract resolves and its constructors match the outgoing typed edges exactly.
